notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien steals (4) 2nd base. Ezequiel Tovar steals (4) home. Edouard Julien advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien steals (4) 2nd base. Ezequiel Tovar steals (4) home. Edouard Julien advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Logan Webb. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chad Stevens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chad Stevens grounds out softly, pitcher Erik Miller to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Chad Stevens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chad Stevens lines out sharply to left fielder Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Willi Castro scores.
